summary.nextFix: AppSpec generation occasionally produces generic /page routes and all endpoints bound to a single entity. A stricter prompt template that enumerates all entity slugs explicitly with their expected routes would reduce sanitization reliance and produce more varied, accurate endpoint bindings per entity.
summary.writtenSummary: The OneAtlas pipeline achieved a 100% success rate across all 12 evaluation prompts including all 5 edge cases. Every prompt completed all three stages — intent extraction, schema generation, and AppSpec generation — without a terminal failure. Total cost across all 12 runs was $0.002717, averaging $0.000226 per generation. Average latency was 10.99 seconds per run. The weakest stage was AppSpec generation, which required sanitization intervention on 3 of 12 prompts and produced retries on 2 runs (prompts 1 and 6). The most common issue was the AI returning generic /page route placeholders instead of entity-derived routes — fixed deterministically in sanitizeAppSpec() by detecting the /page sentinel value and replacing it with a slug derived from boundEntity. The repair engine handled structural and field issues without escalating to full re-prompts in most cases. Edge case prompts performed well: the vague prompt An app produced a generic but valid project management AppSpec with documented assumptions. The ambiguous Notion for doctors prompt correctly inferred a medical domain with Doctor, Patient, Appointment, and Prescription entities. The overscoped platform prompt reduced scope to 4 core entities. The conflicting domain prompt resolved to a unified User, Project, Invoice model. The vague smart modifier was treated as an assumption and documented. One concrete fix for the next iteration: the AppSpec prompt template should explicitly enumerate all entity names with their expected route slugs in the instruction block rather than relying on the sanitization layer to correct /page placeholders after generation.

results.prompt: Build a CRM for a real estate agency. Agents manage leads, properties, and deals. Admin sees analytics. WhatsApp notifications when a deal closes.
results.notes: AppSpec generation required 1 retry. WhatsApp integration correctly detected and mapped to Deal status_changed trigger.

results.prompt: Task manager for an engineering team. Tasks have due dates, assignees, priorities, and status. Team lead gets a Slack message when a task is overdue.
results.notes: Clean run, no retries. Slack integration correctly detected.

results.prompt: Inventory system for a warehouse. Products, stock movements, suppliers. Low stock triggers an email alert.
results.notes: Clean run. Email alert correctly mapped to gmail integration.

results.prompt: HR tool for a 50-person company. Track employees, leave requests, and performance reviews. Notify manager on Slack when leave is approved.
results.notes: AppSpec generation took longer due to complex permission matrix. Slack correctly mapped to LeaveRequest status_changed trigger.

results.prompt: E-commerce backend. Products, orders, customers, payments via Stripe. Order confirmation sent via Gmail.
results.notes: Both Stripe and Gmail integrations correctly detected. Clean run.

results.prompt: Event management platform. Organizers create events, attendees register, QR check-in at the door. Confirmation via WhatsApp.
results.notes: Initial run produced /page placeholder routes. Fixed by sanitizeAppSpec route correction logic deriving slugs from boundEntity. After fix routes correctly show /organizers, /events, /attendees, /dashboard.

results.prompt: Project tracker. Projects, milestones, tasks. Sync tasks to Jira. Update a Google Sheet with weekly progress.
results.notes: Both Jira and Google Sheets integrations correctly detected. Clean run.
Vague prompt handled gracefully. Intent extraction produced assumptions array with at least 3 documented assumptions. No crash. Generic project management AppSpec generated.

results.prompt: Build something like Notion for doctors.
results.notes: Ambiguous prompt correctly resolved. Domain correctly inferred as medical. Entities are semantically correct for a doctor-facing Notion-like tool.

results.prompt: A platform with login, payments, roles, real-time chat, file uploads, native mobile, analytics, and a marketplace.
results.notes: Overscoped prompt correctly reduced to 4 MVP entities. Real-time chat, native mobile, marketplace scoped out. Assumptions documented in intent extraction output.

results.prompt: A CRM but also a project manager but also an invoicing tool.
results.notes: Conflicting domain resolved to unified model. Intent extraction required 1 retry. Final entities correctly span all three domains.

results.prompt: Task manager, but make it smart.
results.notes: Vague smart modifier documented as assumption in intent extraction. Interpreted as AI-prioritized tasks, deadline tracking, and workload balancing. Valid AppSpec generated.
